headline: Measles 😷🔥 RAGES in SC County, RFK Jr 🧬🤡 Fuels Vaxx Cuckery 💉🚫
text:
Spartanburg County 🏭🌽 in South Cackalacky 🇺🇸🍑 turning into MEASLES HELLFIRE 🔥😷💥 – 789 kids BRRRR'd with blotchy red rashes 🤢🍅, high fevers melting brains 🧠🔥, and docs like Stuart Simko 👨‍⚕️😩 seeing SIX CASES IRL for the first time since vaccine DROPPED the mic 🎤💉! 'TERRIBLE DISEASE killing kiddos 🚼💀 – PREVENTABLE AF but antivaxx simps 🤡🚫 saying NAH!' Largest outbreak since 2000 ELIMINATION 🏆📉 – USA on verge of LOSING IT like UK 🍵 and Canada 🏔️ cucking out, Texas had TWO DEAD SCHOOLIES last year 😢⚰️!

Pediatrician daddy Simko spilling tea ☕: Kids 'VERY SICK' 😰🤒, coulda been JABBED SAFE but low vaxx rates in mill towns 🏭📉 got HERD IMMUNITY GONE ROGUE 🐑💨 – needs 95% MMR shots 💉🔥 but schools dipping to 20% cuz Slavic churches 🙏🚫 and Russian/Ukrainian immigrants 🇺🇦🇷🇺 dodging the prick! Kate Martin momma 👩‍👧 screaming 'COVID 2.0 EVERY SCHOOL QUARANTINED 21 DAYS ⏰🚫!' Dozens unjabbed zoomers 🍑📚 locked down like bad fanfic.

Even REPUBLICAN SEN Josh Kimbrell 🗳️🐘 – COVID mandate hater 🤬💉 – got WOKE after his buddy's vaxxed teacher wife 👩‍🏫💉 hit ICU for 2 WEEKS from kid exposure 😱🏥! 'Close to FIRST DEATH 💀 – gonna attend FUNERAL for PREVENTABLE BULLSHIT and be PISSED 😡🔥!' Dropped social media BOMB 💣📱 balancing 'personal choice' 🙌 but now LIMIT UNVAX XD GOERS 🚫🍑 – vitriol from hesitancy Karens 👱‍♀️🤬 accusing RIGHTS VIOLATION 😂 but numbers SLAYING!

Antivaxx queen Inna 🇺🇦 shrugs 'MORE SCARED OF VAX AUTISM LIES 🧠🚫 than measles' – kids had chickenpox fine 🐔🍗 but measles = ENCEPHALITIS 🧠💥 and IMMUNE AMNESIA wiping memory like bad breakup 😵‍💫! Arizona mom Lorna White 👩‍👧‍👧‍👦 got whole fam measles over XMAS 🎄😷 saying 'MILD OR overhype?' – girl, long-term BRAIN FRY incoming 🤯! Prof Jennifer Grier 🧑‍🔬 spilling: Vax risks TINY vs measles MURDER MODE 🔪💀.

RFK Jr 🧬👑 – vaccine skeptic GOAT 🐐🤡 – remaking CDC policy SLASHING kid jabs ✂️💉, mixed MMR vibes like flaky ex 😏🚫, silent on SC chaos while allies like Kirk Milhoan 📢 say make POLIO/MEASLES OPTIONAL for 'REAL-WORLD DATA' on deaths/hospis 😂🧪 – docs screaming 'WE KNOW IT KILLS DUMBASS' 🤬🧠! Ralph Abraham shrugs 'NOT BIGGIE' 😎📉 as elimination status YEETS 🚀💥. Mobile clinics jabbed 62 peeps 💉🏕️ but Kennedy's doubt got Spartanburg simping HARD 🤤🚫 – 'He's RESPECTED here' says locals, fueling hesitancy ORGY 💦🤡!

Public health daddies WORRIED 😰📈: Next PANDEMIC VIBES with vax drops 📉 – polio, mumps, rubella coming BACK like zombie apocalypse 🧟‍♂️🔥! Chris Lombardozzi MD chief ⚕️🏥: It'll RIP thru low-vaxx hoods 🏘️😷 then JUMP to next crew. 'FAILURE OF PUBLIC HEALTH NATION 💥🇺🇸 – we GOT the shots but letting measles THRUST AGAIN ⬆️😩!' Utah-AZ border also RAGING 🔥🌵 with hundreds sick. Vaxx or cuck – your call bby, but docs ain't forcing, just watching funerals stack ⚰️📈‼️
